snippets.description: sign_user_id + resolve_user_id_from_cookie: itsdangerous signed cookie with a 7-day legacy-raw-cookie grace window (SESSION_MIGRATION_CUTOFF).
snippets.content: def sign_user_id(user_id) -> str: return _get_serializer().dumps(int(user_id)) ; def resolve_user_id_from_cookie(raw_cookie, now=None): valid signed -> int; grace-period raw digit -> int; else None

snippets.description: resolve_authenticated_user_id(request) shared helper + get_current_client rewired through it. All 19 other route handlers migrated to this helper (see route-coverage grep).
Cookie is signed at every write site (login + both OAuth-callback writes) so a raw forgeable cookie is never re-issued.
hmac.compare_digest(provided, TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET) before request.json(); fail-closed 403 when secret unset or mismatched.
snippets.content: if not hmac.compare_digest(provided, webhook_secret): return JSONResponse({'status':'error','message':'unauthorized'}, status_code=403)

snippets.description: Hardcoded admin/admin123 removed; admin created only from INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD env, else warn.
snippets.content: initial_admin_password = os.getenv('INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD'); if not set -> warn and create nothing

snippets.description: automation_enabled/hard_exit_triggered set BEFORE square-off loop (race fix); exit_position -> cancel_order(sl_order_id) with confirm-before-clear bookkeeping.
snippets.content: state.automation_enabled = False; state.hard_exit_triggered = True (pre-loop). result = await asyncio.to_thread(client.cancel_order, sl_order_id)

snippets.description: order_lock now wraps limit-check + regime checks + place_order + record_trade as one atomic section (TOCTOU fix).
snippets.content: async with state.order_lock: <check> ... result = client.place_order(...); if result.get('success'): state.record_trade()

snippets.description: One-time re-encryption: decrypt with ENCRYPTION_KEY_OLD, re-encrypt with ENCRYPTION_KEY, auto pre-migration backup, single transaction.
snippets.content: Fernet(old).decrypt -> Fernet(new).encrypt; shutil.copy2 backup; conn.commit single tx
